BrowserActionPayload.description:
Bounded action description. ``action_type`` is restricted to v1 allowlist.
Per-action params are optional and validated at proposal-create time.
BrowserActionPayload.title: BrowserActionPayload

operator_mode.description: If True, direct browser action endpoints return 409 OPERATOR_MODE_REQUIRES_APPROVAL; actions must be dispatched via /api/browser-operator approval flow.
operator_mode.title: Operator Mode

ChatMessageIn.description: ``content`` is a string for assistant/system; user may also send ``ham_chat_user_v1`` JSON objects.
ChatMessageIn.title: ChatMessageIn

ChatOperatorPayload.description: Explicit operator follow-up (confirm apply / register / launch) from the client.
ChatOperatorPayload.title: ChatOperatorPayload

messages.description: Exactly one new user turn per request. When session_id is set, prior transcript is loaded server-side; do not resend earlier user/assistant messages from the browser.
messages.title: Messages

ClaudeAgentMissionHttpResponse.description: Bounded mission outcome — fixed prompt only; no arbitrary user input.
ClaudeAgentMissionHttpResponse.title: ClaudeAgentMissionHttpResponse

ClaudeAgentSmokeHttpResponse.description: Internal smoke outcome — no env dumps, keys, or user-supplied secrets.
ClaudeAgentSmokeHttpResponse.title: ClaudeAgentSmokeHttpResponse

avatar_url.description: https?:// URL or data:image/*;base64,... avatar (persisted in settings).
avatar_url.title: Avatar Url

data.description: Raw string (e.g. lines, or \x03 for Ctrl+C)
data.title: Data

LaunchCloudAgentBody.description: Maps to Cursor Cloud Agents `POST /v0/agents` (minimal fields).

mission_handling.description: How the mission was initiated in HAM (not sent to Cursor). Omitted = legacy/unspecified.
mission_handling.title: Mission Handling

project_id.description: Optional registered HAM project id (not sent to Cursor). When set, managed missions snapshot deploy approval default from project metadata.
project_id.title: Project Id

uplink_id.description: Optional Ham-side correlation id (not sent to Cursor).
uplink_id.title: Uplink Id

LaunchCloudAgentBody.title: LaunchCloudAgentBody

OpenCodeBuildLaunchBody.description:
Launch body. Fields are intentionally optional so the Mission 1
"disabled shim" 503 envelope keeps firing for callers that have not
yet been updated to send the digest + base_revision pair (Mission 1
tests pass ``{project_id, user_prompt}`` only). All required-field
validation moves into the handler so the disabled-state 503 fires
before Pydantic's 422.
OpenCodeBuildLaunchBody.title: OpenCodeBuildLaunchBody

OpencodeLaunchProxyBody.description:
Browser-callable body. Rejects extra keys so a misbehaving caller
cannot smuggle a token field past the gate.
OpencodeLaunchProxyBody.title: OpencodeLaunchProxyBody

PatchProjectRequest.description: Shallow merge into ``ProjectRecord.metadata``. Use JSON ``null`` for a key to remove it.
PatchProjectRequest.title: PatchProjectRequest

PostManagedDeployApprovalBody.description: Record an operator decision (all modes are non-blocking except **hard** on the deploy route).

mission_registry_id.description: Optional; resolved from mission store when omitted.
mission_registry_id.title: Mission Registry Id

state.description: Most recent decision wins for **hard** policy.
state.title: State

PostManagedDeployApprovalBody.title: PostManagedDeployApprovalBody

ProposerActor.description:
Originator of the proposal. ``label`` is operator-chosen and capped; no
secrets, paths, or tokens belong here.
ProposerActor.title: ProposerActor

agents.description: Full replacement for the agents subtree in .ham/settings.json (HAM agent builder).

TriggerDeployHookBody.description: Optional audit key; hook URL is resolved from per-repo map + global policy.
TriggerDeployHookBody.title: TriggerDeployHookBody

get.description: So opening the Cloud Run URL in a tab is not a bare 404 JSON.

get.description:
Export persisted chat transcript as PDF (sanitized; no attachment re-fetch).

**Authorization:** Same as :func:`get_chat_session` — ``enforce_clerk_session_and_email_for_request``
when Clerk auth is enabled; no separate export policy.

**Session scope:** when ``workspace_id`` is supplied, export uses the same user/workspace
ownership check as ``GET /api/chat/sessions/{id}``. When ``workspace_id`` is omitted, legacy
sessions (no stored owner) remain readable; tenant-scoped sessions still require the
authenticated Clerk user to match the session owner.

schema.title: Response Launch Opencode Build Api Opencode Build Launch Post

post.description:
Browser-callable OpenCode launch — returns immediately with ham_run_id.

The full gate stack is validated synchronously (fast).  Once all gates
pass, a ``ControlPlaneRun`` with ``status="running"`` is persisted and
the HTTP response is returned immediately so the browser is never kept
waiting for the full OpenCode runtime.

The actual OpenCode mission runs in a ``BackgroundTask`` (via
``asyncio.to_thread``) and overwrites the running row with the terminal
status when it finishes.  Callers poll
``GET /api/control-plane-runs/{ham_run_id}`` for completion.

schema.title: Response Launch Opencode Build Proxy Api Opencode Build Launch Proxy Post
